name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Architecture and performance foundation
release_notes: Starts the Pathmark architecture/performance pass: top-level, Planning and Nutrition navigation now render one selected section at a time; developer diagnostics track reruns, Sheets reads/writes, cache hits and unsaved local changes; high-interaction areas continue to use local session state and explicit saves.
notes: Top-level navigation now renders only the selected Pathmark section instead of executing every tab body on each rerun.
Planning and Nutrition subnavigation now render one selected section at a time, reducing accidental loading of unrelated workflows during small interactions.
Developer settings includes a Performance diagnostics panel for rerun time, Google Sheets reads/writes, cache hits and unsaved local changes.
Added core architecture modules for performance, session-state helpers, cache helpers and reusable fragments as a foundation for future feature modules.
Shopping trolley dirty-state tracking now records unsaved local shopping changes for developer diagnostics while preserving explicit Save changes behaviour.
